Interface AsyncApi3xComponents

All Superinterfaces:
AsyncApiComponents, Components, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi30Components, AsyncApi31Components
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi30ComponentsImpl, AsyncApi31ComponentsImpl
public interface AsyncApi3xComponents extends AsyncApiComponents
